name: Chicken and Spaghetti I
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the fryers until cooked through.
2. Remove and discard the bones; set aside 1 quart of broth in a bowl, straining it into another container to remove any impurities.
3. Add chopped bell pepper, onion, and celery to the strained broth.
4. Cook the vegetables until tender.
5. Stir in pimiento, mushroom soup, and spaghetti. Simmer until all ingredients are cooked through.
6. Layer 1 layer of spaghetti at the bottom of a casserole dish, followed by a layer of cheese, then a layer of chicken. Repeat these layers until all ingredients are used up.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 25 minutes, or until hot and bubbly.
